PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Bridges, in person, for Jenny Wai, in person, Petitioner.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 4/28/2020 is admitted to probate. Jenny Wai is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for 10/18/2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by 10/11/2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Bridges, in person, for Jenny Wai, in person, Petitioner.

The court begins by advising counsel that with regard to the Spousal Property Petition ("SPP"), the will does not cover the Wells Fargo accounts. Counsel advises that the account had inadvertently been omitted from the will but that it is community property as stated in attachment number seven (7) to the SPP and offers oral testimony in support of his position. After consideration, the court advises that it appears as though the Wells Fargo Accounts may indeed be community property.

The Spousal Property Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
